diagramConstraints.description: Use PascalCase for entity names and camelCase for attribute names
Mark primary key attributes with PK notation
Always specify cardinality on both ends of relationships (one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many)
Include data types for each attribute (string, int, date, boolean, etc.)

formattingRules.description: Add verb labels to relationship lines describing the association (e.g., 'has', 'belongs to')
